package rulecoverage

func PositiveTxWithoutRollbackGuard() string {
    ruleID := "tx_without_rollback_guard"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Transactions begun and later committed with no observed rollback guard."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
